productName: Blaze Gummy - Zero Sugar - Good Night Grape 2:2:1 CBN:CBD:THC 500mg
description: A mouth-watering sweet, candy-like grape infused treat with candy-kitchen charm and a smooth cannabis experience tucked into every serving. It blends CBN to help you relax and ease into rest, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and THC for a classic euphoric lift in a 2:2:1 ratio. Rich on flavor and easy to enjoy — start with a comfortable serving and let the edible do the rest.
